TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tjailjaking, title = Tjailjaking, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tjailjaking} }

S.FORM: alang Tjailjaking ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 240 buwan, 875 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 820 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 55 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 84%, Rukay 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjailjaking hya' ga Sagaran. tay mkyahu' na Tjailjaking hya' ga Timur. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Tjailjaking ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Santimon go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 240 buwan, 875 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 820 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 55 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Paywan 84%, Rukay 2%, Bunun 1%, Puyuma 1%, binah lihuyan s'uli 5%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkraya' na Tjailjaking hya' ga Sagaran. tay mkyahu' na Tjailjaking hya' ga Timur. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy maki 1 pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy. pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tjailjakiŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu s~ɕantimon ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, pajwan **%, rukaj *%, βunun *%, pujuma *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkrajaʔ na tjailjakiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕaɣaran. taj mkjaħuʔ na tjailjakiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa timur. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj maki * pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj. pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
